summary: Warm, clear audience pull that showcases a jam‑heavy night with smoking Space > The Other One, haunting Wharf Rat and a headline Scarlet > Fire.
review: These three fan reviews all rave about the same audience recording, praising its warmth, balanced clarity and vocal definition. The show itself is highlighted for its extended Space → The Other One → Wharf Rat segue, plus standout renditions of Minglewood, Peggy‑O, Candyman, Scarlet > Fire and a soaring Brokedown Palace encore.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviewers give high marks (4–5 stars) and consistently praise both the musical performance and the audio quality, indicating an exceptional show captured with excellent audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Warm, clear sound with balanced vocals and instruments; listeners note it as the best of the available audience pulls for this concert.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert builds a deep, jam‑centric second set highlighted by the Space → The Other One segue and a haunting Wharf Rat, while the first set delivers tight blues (Minglewood) and folk (Peggy-O). Energy peaks with Scarlet > Fire and an uplifting Stones > Not Fade Away into a memorable Brokedown Palace encore.
